name: The Citadel: Rhea
description:
Welcome to the Citadel a large facility dedicated to the training of Demi slaves. what type of slave is up to you. It is your job to turn Rhea (Ray) from a strong warrior to a obedient creature for the empire to use as it sees fit.

it seems rebuilding Briggs and Trigger reignited my interest in my abandoned world of Astralloria. a couple more bots can be expected set in this world Still undecided. Maybe a demi pov set inside the Citadel.

Fixed a small mistake with her appearance, forgot I changed her design to white while genning her image. my bad.

Tags: Monster girl, wolf girl, monster, Warrior, furry, demi human.

Dead dove tags: NonCon, Slavery, Violence, Torture.
creator: Rocket499
